Summary: Implement Document Library List View
Description: Outcome: Users can view all their documents in a global library.

Summary: Implement Document Metadata Model and Persistence
Description: Outcome: Documents support title, type, status, tags, ownership, and timestamps.

Summary: Implement Document Version Model and Persistence
Description: Outcome: Documents support version history with version metadata.

Summary: Implement Document Upload Workflow
Description: Outcome: Users can upload supported document files, validate file constraints, and store them in library records.

Summary: Implement Document Download/Export Workflow
Description: Outcome: Users can download/export selected document versions from library and job context views.

Summary: Implement Library Filtering and Sorting
Description: Outcome: Users can filter/sort by type, status, tag, and updated date.

Summary: Implement Document Duplicate and Rename Actions
Description: Outcome: Users can duplicate existing artifacts and rename cleanly.

Summary: Implement Archive and Restore for Documents
Description: Outcome: Users can archive and restore documents without hard deletion.

Summary: Implement Job-to-Library Linking UX
Description: Outcome: Job detail allows linking/unlinking library documents to applications.

Summary: Implement Library Visibility in Job Detail Context
Description: Outcome: Job detail displays linked documents and relevant versions clearly.

Summary: Implement Company Research Input and Prompt UX in Job Detail
Description: Outcome: Users can trigger AI-assisted company research from job detail using user-provided context.

Summary: Persist Company Research Notes to Job Record
Description: Outcome: Research output is saved as editable notes tied to the job.

Summary: Add Interview Preparation Notes Section in Job Detail
Description: Outcome: Users can maintain structured prep notes for interviews.

Summary: Expand Dashboard Analytics (Velocity and Stage Conversion)
Description: Outcome: Dashboard includes conversion and time-in-stage analytics from stored events.

Summary: Provision Cloud Runtime for Frontend and Backend
Description: Outcome: App is deployed to cloud with public URL and documented environment setup.

Summary: Configure Production Database and Migrations
Description: Outcome: Production data store is provisioned with migration strategy and rollback plan.

Summary: Configure CI/CD Deployment Pipeline
Description: Outcome: Merge to main triggers production deployment with health checks.

Summary: Implement Centralized Error Handling and Logging
Description: Outcome: Server/client errors are captured consistently with actionable context.

Summary: Implement Performance and Accessibility Pass
Description: Outcome: Team executes and documents fixes for major performance/accessibility issues.

Summary: Expand Unit Test Coverage for Security and Ownership Rules
Description: Outcome: Critical authorization and ownership enforcement paths are unit-tested.

Summary: Expand Unit Test Coverage for Document Logic
Description: Outcome: Document versioning, archive/restore, upload/download, and job-link ownership rules are unit-tested.

Summary: Final Release Readiness and Demo Hardening
Description: Outcome: Team completes release checklist, smoke tests, and demo stabilization.
